_comment: Example 5 — Government analytics platform under FedRAMP HIGH. Regulated data, export-controlled material, partner + government users, multi-region. Exercises: FedRAMP HIGH baseline + FedRAMP package, NIST 800-171 CUI mapping, all 20 NIST control families, AC-17 remote-access flow, agency overlay (DoD IL4).

business.businessProblem: Provides federal-mission analytics for cross-agency reporting and partner data sharing under controlled-unclassified-information (CUI) policy.
business.userInteractionDescription: Agency analysts use a hardened web console behind GovCloud SSO; partner agencies ingest reports via API; ETL pipelines run inbound from authorised data sources.

impact.confidentialityWorstCase: Disclosure of CUI or export-controlled data triggers regulatory action, contract loss, and possible criminal exposure.
impact.integrityWorstCase: Corrupted analytics drive incorrect federal decisions; legal action.
impact.availabilityWorstCase: Mission delay; political and operational fallout.

population.expectedGrowth: Step changes as new agencies onboard
